title: Pub Trivia
description: Every Wednesday, grab your smartest friends and put your knowledge to the test. Bragging rights, prizes, and a round on the house for the winning table.

title: Fantasy Draft Headquarters
description: Free WiFi, a full bar, and zero judgment if you draft a kicker in the third round. Bring your laptop, your league, and your worst trash talk.

title: Beer Tasting Nights
description: A rotating lineup of seasonal and hard-to-find brews, guided by our own staff. Come with an open mind and leave with a new favorite.

title: Sausage Tasting
description: Small plates, big flavors. Sample our traditional, exotic, and seasonal links side by side — including a few specials you won't find on the regular menu.
